Table of Contents

Interface IMapPoint

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

A point in map space (easting, northing) or (longitude, latitude) with its associated uncertainty information.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("5F3A89C1-3ED5-4F56-BDF5-22008D23B143")]
public interface IMapPoint : IPoint, IGeometry
